---
title: "Class 10 Structural Bioformatics 1"
author: "Joshua Khalil A17784122"
format: html
---


## PDB Statisitics 

The protein data bank is the main repository of biomolecular structures. lets see what it contains



>Q1: What percentage of structures in the PDB are solved by X-Ray and Electron Microscopy.

The comma in these numbers leads to numbers being read as

```{r}
library(readr)
stats <- read.csv("pdb_stats.csv")
```


>Q2: What proportion of structures in the PDB are protein?

>Q3: Type HIV in the PDB website search box on the home page and determine how many HIV-1 protease structures are in the current PDB?
